name: Biscotti Di Anise
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together in a large bowl.
2. Add the eggs one at a time and beat them in.
3. Mix in the anise seeds.
4. Add the vanilla and stir it in.
5. In another mixing bowl, combine the flour and baking powder.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture.
7. Stir in the chopped almonds until well combined.
8. Form the dough into a flat loaf and cover it. Place in the refrigerator overnight.
9. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
10. Remove the loaf from the refrigerator and place on a cookie sheet.
11. Bake for 20 minutes, or until firm.
12. Let cool before slicing diagonally into 3/4-inch thick slices.
13. Return the slices to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
14. Allow to cool before serving.
